name: Gmail Invoice & Receipt Auto-Organizer to Google Drive
description: Polls Gmail weekly, classifies receipts as Subscriptions (with subfolder) or One-Time (direct to Receipts/SenderName/), and organizes everything under Accounting/ in Google Drive.

parameters.content:
## 📧 Gmail Invoice & Receipt Auto-Organizer

**Polls Gmail every Monday at 8am.**

**Google Drive structure:**
```
Accounting/
  Invoices/
    SenderName/
  Receipts/
    Subscriptions/
      SenderName/
    SenderName/   <- One-Time goes directly here
```

**Subscription detection:**
- Keywords: subscription, renewal, monthly, annual, recurring, membership, etc.
- Recurring sender: if sender was seen before in Subscriptions
- Uncertain = defaults to One-Time (no subfolder, needsReview=true)

**Folder matching:** Case-insensitive. Partial match fallback.

**Setup:** Connect Gmail OAuth2 + Google Drive OAuth2, then activate.

## 📁 Folder Resolution
1. Accounting/ (root)
2. Invoices/ or Receipts/ inside Accounting
3. Subscriptions only: find/create Subscriptions/ inside Receipts
4. One-Time: skip subfolder — SenderName/ goes directly inside Receipts/
5. Find/create SenderName/ (case-insensitive + partial match)
6. Upload file

One-Time receipts flagged needsReview=true — check Receipts/SenderName/ and reclassify if needed.

filters.q: subject:(invoice OR receipt OR "payment confirmation" OR "order confirmation" OR "billing statement") has:attachment
